❤️ CardiovascularREF: FLOM19A-FLOM27A✓ Brochure Verified

Flomero Pericardial Bioprosthesis - Aortic Valve

Flomero · Heart Valves

The Flomero Pericardial Bioprosthesis is a tri-leaflet stented heart valve designed for both aortic and mitral valve replacement. It features bovine pericardium tissue leaflets treated with proprietary Anti-Calcification Technology and a triad-frame design for robustness and superior hemodynamics.

MaterialBovine pericardium tissue
WhatsApp Quote
Full Technical Matrix
Full Technical Matrix

Flomero Pericardial Bioprosthesis - Aortic Valve

Technical Blueprint SpecificationClinical Value
Aortic Sizes
19 mm, 21 mm, 23 mm, 25 mm, 27 mm
Mitral Sizes
23 mm, 25 mm, 27 mm, 29 mm, 31 mm
Storage Temperature
10°C to 25°C (50-77°F)
Rinse Procedure
1 min rinse each in first 3 bowls and store in 4th bowl prior to implantation
MRI Safety Information
MR conditional in magnetic fields of 1.5 and 3.0 Tesla
Internal Stent Post Diameter (Aortic)
18 mm to 26 mm
External Sewing Ring Diameter (Aortic)
27 mm to 36 mm
External Sewing Ring Diameter (Mitral)
33 mm to 43 mm

Storage Solution

Glutaraldehyde

Primary Material

Bovine pericardium tissue

CDSCO Validated Data
Frequently Asked Questions

The Flomero Pericardial Bioprosthesis Aortic Valve features premium bovine pericardium tissue with advanced Triad-frame Elgiloy wireform design for optimal hemodynamic performance. Available in sizes 19-27mm with MR conditional safety at 1.5T and 3.0T, ensuring precise fit for diverse patient anatomies. This cardiac surgery valve offers superior durability and biocompatibility for aortic valve replacement procedures. Designed with tissue annulus diameter 20-28.5mm and external sewing ring diameter 27-36mm for enhanced surgical precision.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Flomero Pericardial Bioprosthesis - Aortic Valve, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Flomero Pericardial Bioprosthesis - Aortic Valve is constructed using Bovine pericardium tissue, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
